episodes.text: Admitted with decompensated heart failure; IV furosemide, strict fluid balance, 1.5 L restriction; O2 2 L, sats 94%; sleeps propped on three pillows.
Admission weight 82.4 kg - daily weights and strict intake/output charting for diuresis.
episodes.why_hint: weigh before breakfast; escalate if weight rises or urine output drops
